result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,'')) AS old_owner_raw,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,'')) AS new_owner_raw,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner_raw, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner_raw <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  -- Agents who handled > 0 cases in period: anyone appearing as old or new owner in owner changes
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(oldvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner' AND COALESCE(oldvalue__c,'') <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(newvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner' AND COALESCE(newvalue__c,'') <> ''
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
  WHERE ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_counts
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,'')) AS old_owner_raw,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,'')) AS new_owner_raw,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner_raw, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner_raw <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  -- Agents who handled > 0 cases in period: anyone appearing as old or new owner in owner changes
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(oldvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner' AND COALESCE(oldvalue__c,'') <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(newvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner' AND COALESCE(newvalue__c,'') <> ''
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
  WHERE ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_counts
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,'')) AS old_owner_raw,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,'')) AS new_owner_raw,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_REPLACE(old_owner_raw, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner_raw <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  -- Agents who handled > 0 cases in period: anyone appearing as old or new owner in owner changes
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(oldvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner' AND COALESCE(oldvalue__c,'') <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(newvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner' AND COALESCE(newvalue__c,'') <> ''
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
  WHERE ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_counts
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS owner_history_rows
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
WHERE ch.field__c='Owner';

args.query:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
  ) s
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE ha.agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS asof,
         TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
assignments AS (

    REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,'')), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.asof
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
  ) s
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE ha.agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
